content.full_text:
February 14, 1991

Linda Cassidy
Fair Political Practices Commission
428 J Street, #300
Sacramento, CA 95814

Re: Central Labor Council of Santa Clara County
--UFW Loan

Dear Ms. Cassidy:

Following our conversations with your office, we have advised our client, the Central Labor Council of Santa Clara County, that the loan to the Committee on Political Education made by the United Farm Workers may now be written off in its entirety (there is a $7,500 balance). As we have previously discussed, the loan has long since become unenforceable due to the passage of time and, more recently, the Taxpayers decision appears to render inapplicable any restrictions against writing off the loan in full. Based upon your concurrence in this, my clients will write off the loan in the most recent reporting period.

Thank you for your assistance in this matter.

Sincerely,

McTERNAN, STENDER & WALSH

[signature]
BRIAN C. WALSH

BCW/JM
cc: Richard F. Sawyer
j:\clc
